headlines.title: Federal firefighters will be encouraged to wear N95 respirators in major policy reversal
headlines.description: Although wildland firefighters are at high risk for smoke-related health issues, the U.S. Forest Service has for decades not allowed respirators.

headlines.title: As cancer death rates plunge, clear disparities remain, report says
headlines.description: Black and American Indian/Alaska Native communities have the highest cancer rates of any racial or ethnic group in the U.S.

headlines.title: Some babies still sick months after botulism outbreak in formula
headlines.description: Months after a recall of ByHeart baby formula due to a botulism outbreak, some babies sickened are still recovering. NBC News’ Erika Edwards shares stories from families who were impacted.

headlines.title: How to Prevent and Treat the Pains of Acid Reflux and GERD
headlines.description: NBC’s Dr. Natalie Azar and Joy Bauer join TODAY to discuss how to prevent and manage acid reflux, also known as Gastroesophageal Reflux Disease, or GERD. Dr. Azar breaks down the risk factors and Joy lists common triggers and habits for relief.

headlines.title: Here’s How to Treat and Prevent Those Pesky Summer Headaches
headlines.description: June is National Migraine and Headache Awareness Month so Dr. Jen Caudle, family physician and professor, joins TODAY to break down what “summer headaches” are and how to prevent them. She highlights the factors that can cause these headaches and also breaks down the difference between heat exhaustion and heat stroke.

headlines.title: Coca-Cola, Pepsi, More Team up to Provide Ingredient Information
headlines.description: America’s top beverage companies including Coca-Cola and Pepsi are teaming up in an initiative aimed at helping consumers get important health information in real-time. On billions of packaged beverages sold in the United States, QR codes will direct people to a website where they can see the ingredients in a drink, their functions and how food safety regulators in the U.S. and globally view that ingredient. NBC’s Vicky Nguyen reports for TODAY with an exclusive first look.

headlines.title: Fitness trainers swear by weighted vests — here are the best ones
headlines.description: Do weighted vests really work? Here's why trainers swear by working out with ones from Omorpho, TRX, Go Ruck and more.

headlines.title: The best walking shoes for women on Amazon
headlines.description: We compiled a list of walking sneakers recommended by experts and NBC Select editors from brands like Nike, Asics and Saucony — all available on Amazon.

headlines.title: Can “super shoes” make you super speedy? Here’s what to know about carbon plate sneakers
headlines.description: Experts explain the benefits of carbon plate running shoes and who should wear them. Plus, learn the difference between super shoes for racing and training.

headlines.title: Is this $178 bra actually life-changing?
headlines.description: I tested the Forme Power Bra for five months to see if it could improve my posture and back support. Here’s what actually happened.

headlines.title: Covid vaccine study the acting CDC director blocked is published in an outside journal
headlines.description: The findings suggest that Covid vaccines reduced the likelihood of severe illness last fall and winter.

headlines.title: Medicaid and ACA enrollment falls by more than 5 million, new report finds
headlines.description: The decline over the last 12 months stems in part from President Donald Trump’s Medicaid cuts and the expiration of enhanced Affordable Care Act subsidies.
